title: 2026 Oscar Best Actress Final Predictions
text: AwardsWatch's final predictions declare Jessie Buckley as the clear frontrunner for Best Actress. The only clean sweeper this year, Buckley made history at BAFTA and SAG becoming the first Irish actress to ever win there. In Hamnet, she accumulated nearly 40 critics' prizes, the most for any individual this season. The film is described as a worldwide box office hit that won the Toronto International Film Festival's People's Choice Award. Renate Reinsve from Sentimental Value is ranked second, competing from a Cannes Grand Prize winner. Rose Byrne from If I Had Legs I'd Kick You is ranked third with her Golden Globe win for musical or comedy. Emma Stone and Kate Hudson round out the predictions.
